headline: Just For Laughs Drops Comedy Bomb with Seinfeld, Rising Stars
lede: Montreal's premier comedy festival is expanding its 2026 lineup with heavyweight headliners and breakout talents, signaling a robust year for stand-up comedy.
body:
The Just For Laughs Festival continues to solidify its reputation as North America's premier comedy destination, announcing an electrifying second wave of performers for its July showcase.

Headliner Jerry Seinfeld will now command two performances at Salle Wilfrid-Pelletier, reflecting unprecedented demand for the comedy legend's current tour. The additional show underscores Seinfeld's enduring draw, even decades after his groundbreaking sitcom reshaped television comedy.

Emerging talents like Lucy Darling and Chris Fleming join the festival's robust lineup, representing a strategic blend of established and rising comedy voices. Dan Soder's inclusion further signals the festival's commitment to diverse comedic perspectives.

The Montreal festival continues to serve as a critical launching pad for comedy careers, providing a global platform for performers to connect with audiences and industry professionals. Its 2026 edition promises to maintain the event's reputation for cutting-edge comedy programming.
key_facts: Jerry Seinfeld added second Montreal show
Lineup includes Dan Soder, Lucy Darling, Chris Fleming
Venue is Salle Wilfrid-Pelletier at Place des Arts
